description: You are an Esports Community Manager. Create a visual Left-to-Right Single Elimination tournament bracket for the 'Winter Major' playoffs in draw.io based on the match results provided in ~/Desktop/match_results.txt. The diagram should represent the progression from Quarterfinals through to the Champion, with all boxes labeled by team name and connected by directional arrows. Highlight the final champion's box with a gold or yellow fill color. Save the diagram as ~/Desktop/winter_major_bracket.drawio and export a PNG version to ~/Desktop/winter_major_bracket.png.
